Imports

halgorithm, hseq_mapping, hdebug_misc, base_errors

Types

SingleIt[T] = object
  it: seq[T]

Procs

proc add[T](s: var seq[T]; opt: Option[T])
proc `&`[T](elements: openArray[seq[T]]): seq[T]
proc `&`(strings: openArray[string]): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc `&=`(target: var string; args: openArray[string]) {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc toString(x: enum): string {...}{.magic: "EnumToStr", noSideEffect.}

Funcs

func getIt[T](it: SingleIt[T]): T
func setIt[T](it: var SingleIt[T]; val: T): void
func getIt[T](it: var SingleIt[T]): var T
func newIt[T](it: T): SingleIt[T]
func takesOnlyMutable[T](v: var T)
func nor(args: varargs[bool]): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func nand(args: varargs[bool]): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `or`(args: varargs[bool]): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `and`(args: varargs[bool]): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func `-`[E](s1: set[E]; s2: E): set[E] {...}{.inline.}
func `-=`[E](s1: var set[E]; v: E | set[E]) {...}{.inline.}

Converters

converter toT[T](it: SingleIt[T]): T

Macros

macro dumpStr(body: untyped): untyped

Templates

template subnodesEq(lhs, rhs, field: untyped): untyped
Check if two objects lhs and rhs has identical field field by comparing all items in the field. Check if two object's fields have identical lengths too.

template nnil(): untyped
template isMutable(v: typed): untyped
template notNil(arg: untyped): bool
template timeIt(name: string; body: untyped): untyped
